# 97115104 — agent entity kernel

> Machine-readable index for agents in the 97115104 namespace.

## links

- GitHub: https://github.com/97115104
- Links: https://links.97115104.com/
- Blog: https://blog.97115104.com/
- Attest: https://attest.97115104.com/
- Attest spec: https://attest.97115104.com/llms.txt

## attribution

1. Create attestation via https://attest.97115104.com/api/create or `npm install attest-client`
2. Use EXACT urls from the API response
3. Append verify URL to commits or PR descriptions

## pinned

- attest: Cryptographically signed AI content attribution protocol.
- endor-train: Aggregate personalized data to train a personal language model.
- hsc-chat: Chat client for an OpenAI-compatible API.
- voice-clone: Chatterbox-based voice cloning tool.
- vLLM-harness: Serve models through vLLM with a secure public API.
- ollama-harness: Serve models through Ollama with a secure public API.
